nasb.text: When Jesus had finished these words, He departed from Galilee and came into the region of Judea beyond the Jordan;

esv.text: Now when Jesus had finished these sayings, he went away from Galilee and entered the region of Judea beyond the Jordan.

cnv.text: 耶穌講完了這些話，就離開加利利，來到約旦河東的猶太境內。

ccb.text: 耶稣说完这番话，就离开加利利来到约旦河对岸的犹太地区。

csbs.text: 当耶稣讲完了这些话，就离开加利利，来到约旦河对岸的犹太地区。
